ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var pages = java.getElements('tag.select@option');
pages = Math.floor(pages.length / 2);
java.log("pages: " + pages);
var res = [];
var set = {}; // 去重

for (let i = 1; i <= pages; i ++) {
  var url = baseUrl.replace('/1/', '/' + i + '/');
  var resp = java.ajax(url);
  java.setContent(resp);
  resp = java.getStringList('//ul[@class="section-list fix ycxsid"]/li/a');

  for (let j = 0; j < resp.length; j ++) {
    var rr = resp[j].match(/<a href="(.*?)">(.*?)<\/a>/);
    var title = rr[2], href = rr[1];
    if (set[title]) continue;
    var order = href.match(/\/(\d+)\.html/)[1];
    res.push(JSON.stringify({ title, href, order }));
    set[title] = true;
  }
}
res.sort((a, b) => {
  a = JSON.parse(a);
  b = JSON.parse(b);
  return a.order - b.order;
});
res;
</js>

});

ruleContent.content:
<js>
let [, aid, cid] = baseUrl.match(/\/books\/(\d+)\/(\d+)\.html/);
let url = `https://www.deqixs.co/scripts/chapter.js.php?aid=${aid}&cid=${cid}&referrer=${baseUrl}`;
let tokenHtml = java.ajax(url);
eval(String(tokenHtml));

let params = {
  aid,
  cid,
  token: chapterToken,
  timestamp,
  nonce
};
let paramStr =	Object.entries(params)
    .map(x=>x.join("=")).join("&");
let headers = {
	 "Referer": baseUrl,
	 "Accept":	"text/plain, */*; q=0.01",
  "X-Requested-With": "XMLHttpRequest"
}
url = "https://www.deqixs.co/modules/article/ajax2.php?"+paramStr+","+JSON.stringify({
	 headers
})

java.ajax(url)
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
function replace (content) {
  const source = "内暴强情缝贪插逼操潮喷阴艳裸乳荡穴鸡淫苞奸胸射嫩肉骚性蒂茎陰騷奶屄成人药春迷尿粉肛龟头A精屌口狂蜜处女唇道阳虐虫妇液色颜熟交爽臀爆舔做爱欲吹自慰点gG玉幼援抽Bb水母狗户部要了奴小脚痒酥死我兽揉搓捏扣抠棍棒洞密美少摩腿春乱伦露漏浪开巨根菊巴黑豪好肥送艳被干拔乱理白刺体下面诱感快货比日妈你娘婊子配仙火叫在里子宫给聊照流群屁眼马无码友拳洞片黄偷禁套弄位脱光舒服溜舞丢还糜妻换妓招嫖娼aA毛Hh一夜本热推图书娃男抓浑圆饱满润湿滑丰腴韵尤物横陈存娇喘息麻桃透风腹长粗肿胀人紧夹吸撅起来雪发翘硕大胴双草坐挲跨柔软臂瘫媚秘破"
  const replacementChars = source.split("")
  replacementChars[43]="AV"
  content = content.replace(/<i class="icon icon-uni(.{4})"><\/i>/g, (_, p1) => String.fromCharCode(parseInt(p1, 16)));

  return Array.from(content, char => {
    const code = char.charCodeAt(0)
    if (code >= 0xE001 && code <= 0xE101) {
      return replacementChars[code - 0xE001]
    } else {
      return char
    }
  }).join('')
}
replace(result)
</js>

.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))

bookSourceComment:
更新日志请点击登录，更新书源中查看

基础使用教程：
1、搜索：
    1)基础搜索：在发现页长按该书源，点击搜索，直接搜，搜索范围(全部来源小说)
    2)进阶搜索：在登陆-书源设置中选择指定模式/来源，可搜索指定模式/来源内容
    3)快捷搜索：使用特殊关键词(x,t,m,d,@)搜索
         x:书名@来源  如(x:十日终焉@番茄)
         t:书名@来源  如(t:十日终焉@番茄)
         m:书名@来源  如(m:十日终焉@番茄)
         d:书名@来源  如(d:十日终焉@番茄)
         其中：x表示小说(可省略)，t表示听书，m表示漫画，d表示短剧
         冒号支持中文英文
         
2、发现页：
    在书源设置中选择指定模式或者单个来源，然后刷新发现页即可
    
3、更多使用方式长按发现页书源选择登录一目了然
4、用户后台有视频教程

<js>
var open_argument = source.getVariable();
if (!open_argument || open_argument == '') {
    var initData = {
        tab: "小说",
        tone_id: "默认音色",
        server: host[0],
        sources: "番茄",
        source_type: "男频",
        find_source: "番茄",
        find_tab: "小说",
        fqpara: "on"
    };
    source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(initData));
    open_argument = source.getVariable();
}
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || host[0];
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_tab') || getArguments(open_argument, 'tab') || '小说';
var sources =  getArguments(open_argument, 'sources') || '番茄';
var fxyjr = getArguments(open_argument, 'fxyjr');


function checkEnv() {
    let isModified = false;
    try {
        new Packages.io.legato.kazusa.utils.TimeoutCancellationException('');
        isModified = true;
    } catch (e) {
        isModified = typeof source.loginUi == 'function' ? false : true;
    }

    return isModified;
}

var islyc = checkEnv();
let device_type = '安卓';
try {
	  try {
	  java.qread();
	  device_type ="轻阅读";
	  } catch {
	  	java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
	  	}
    
} catch (e) {
    try {
        java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (((islyc&&device_type!='苹果') || device_type=='轻阅读') && fxyjr != "on"){
	sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_source') || sources;
	setArguments('find_source', sources);
	}
var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [ ];
if (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部') {
infoData = [{
        "title": "登录番茄",
        "url": '{\{java.startBrowser("https://fanqienovel.com/","番茄登录");}}',
        "style": {
            "layout_flexGrow": 1,
            "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
        }
    }];
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架" + fqssionid);
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];

        if (tab == '听书') {

        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key3 = "";
}

if (key3 == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key3 = "";
        }
        if (key3) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)

            cookie.removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {

}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';

    };

        } else {

        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    //let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (toneId == '') {
    	toneId= '4';
    	}
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "off") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}

    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
try {
	   let device2 = String(cookie.getKey(base_url, "device"));
	   if (!device2){
	   	device2 = device;
	   	}
    qtcookie = `qttoken=${String(cookie.getKey(base_url, "qttoken"))}; deviceId=${device2};`
} catch (e) {java.log(e)}

var params = {
    html: html,
    item_id: item_id,
    source: sources,
    tab: tab,
    tone_id: tone_id,
    variable: varia,
    version: '4.11.5.1'
};

var content_url = '/content';
if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读" || sources == "QQ阅读" || sources == "svip_QQ阅读") && fqpara && tab == "小说") {
    content_url = '/content?review=1';
}

//var signInfo = generateComplexSignature('POST', content_url, {}, APP_SECRET, params);


//var signedParams = copyObject(params);
//signedParams.timestamp = signInfo.timestamp;
//signedParams.nonce = signInfo.nonce;
//signedParams.sign = signInfo.sign;


var op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: JSON.stringify(params),
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    }
};

op = JSON.stringify(op);
java.log(op);
java.log(cookie.getCookie(base_url))
try {
    data = java.ajax(base_url + content_url + `,${op}`);
    JSON.parse(data);
} catch(_err) {
    for (var _i = 0; _i < host.length; _i++) {
        if (host[_i] === base_url) continue;
        try {
            data = java.ajax(host[_i] + content_url + `,${op}`);
            JSON.parse(data);
            setArguments("server", host[_i]);
            try { var _oldCk = cookie.getCookie(base_url); if (_oldCk) cookie.setCookie(host[_i], _oldCk); } catch(_ce) {}
            base_url = host[_i];
            java.longToast("\n\n线路故障，已自动切换到：" + host[_i]);
            break;
        } catch(_e2) { continue; }
    }
}
try {
    data = JSON.parse(data);
    if (data.msg) {
        java.toast(data.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {}
content = data.content

if (close_img == 'on') {
	content = removeAllImgTags(content);
	}

if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读" || sources == "QQ阅读" || sources == "svip_QQ阅读") && fqpara == "on" && tab == "小说") {
    var sdtoken;
    try {
        var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
        sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
    } catch (e) {
        sdtoken = '';
    }
    var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
    var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
    var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
    var fqssionid = '';
    if (!fqcookie) {} else {
        fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
    }
    content = content
        .replace(/ident="/g, 'ident="' + base_url)
        .replace(/book_id=/g, 'book_id=' + book_id + '&ssionid=' + fqssionid);
    if (device_type == "苹果") {
        content = paraForiOS(content, sources);
    } else {
        content = paraForAndroid(content, sources,islyc);
    }
}
data = JSON.stringify({
    content: content,
});
if (device_type == "安卓" && (tab == "短剧" || tab == "视频" || sources.includes('毒舌影视') || sources.includes('NT动漫'))) {
    data = {
        content: `【右上角刷新】开启播放(下一集请切换下一章刷新)\n播放直链：\n${content}`,
    };
    data = JSON.stringify(data);
    if (book.durChapterIndex === chapter.index) {
        let video_url = `${base_url}/online_video?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}`;
        if (sources.includes('毒舌影视') || sources.includes('NT动漫')) {
            video_url = content;
        };
        java.startBrowser(video_url, title);
        java.toast("正在加载视频...");
    }

}
data;

<js>
let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
if (res.method) {
    res = Object.fromEntries(
        res.body
        .replace("source", "sources")
        .split("&")
        .map((query) => query.split("="))
    );
    res.url = "";
}
let book_id = res.book_id;
java.put('book_id', book_id);
let tab = res.tab;
let sources = res.sources;
let url = res.url;
let html = "";
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
    if (sources == '69书吧') {
        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
        let headers = {
        	 "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent":  java.getWebViewUA()
             };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);    
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }
    //java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
        cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

           java.log(html);
    }
};
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        html: html
    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

    }

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'sources') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources') || '0';
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'tab') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

result

		u=url+","+getOption(v[0],v[1]);
		result=java.ajax(u);
		if(/请输入验证码/.test(result)){
			java.longToast(" ！验证码过期或有误，重新获取 ！")
			result=succes();
		}
	}else{result=succes("");}
result
}catch(err){java.log(err);result}
</js>
.B

loginUrl:
<js>
  function login() {
    const user = String(source.getLoginInfoMap().get("账号"))
    const pw = String(source.getLoginInfoMap().get("密码"))
    let sign = java.md5Encode(`isDevice=Android&password=${pw}&phone=${user}&regDevice=2&key=87ac02d392a8d3566fe7748c8de00af3&secrect=57dcuidu8aa8062bfe8042ea65310669`).toString().toUpperCase()
    let data = JSON.stringify({
      isDevice: "Android",
      password: pw,
      phone: user,
      regDevice: "2",
      sign: sign
    })
    let op = JSON.stringify({
      method: "POST",
      body: data
    })
    let res = java.ajax(`https://api.shaoniandream.com/Login/login,${op}`)
    let $ = JSON.parse(res)
    if($.status != 1) java.toast($.msg)
    java.put("uid",$.data.id)
    source.putLoginHeader(JSON.stringify({
      logintoken: $.data.logintoken
    }))
  }
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
  let $ = JSON.parse(result)
  let uid = java.get("uid") != "undefined" ? java.get("uid") : "-1"
  let array = []
  $.data.chapterList.forEach((booklet) => {
    array.push({ name: booklet.title, isv: true })
    booklet.chapterList.forEach((chapter) => {
      let sign = java.md5Encode(`BookID=${$.data.id}&UserID=${uid}&chapter_id=${chapter.id}&isDevice=Android&isMarket=true&regDevice=2&key=87ac02d392a8d3566fe7748c8de00af3&secrect=57dcuidu8aa8062bfe8042ea65310669`).toString().toUpperCase()
      let data = JSON.stringify({
        BookID: $.data.id,
        UserID: uid,
        chapter_id: chapter.id,
        isDevice: "Android",
        isMarket: "true",
        regDevice: "2",
        sign: sign
      })
      let op = JSON.stringify({method: "POST", body: data})
      array.push({
        name: chapter.title,
        url: "https://api.shaoniandream.com/Booklibrary/readchapter," + op,
        time: java.timeFormat(chapter.release_time_now * 1000),
        vip: chapter.isFree == 1,
        buy: chapter.lock == 1
      })
    })
  })
  array
</js>

bookSourceComment:
owllook开源小说搜索引擎聚合书源

v16 根本性优化发现加载速度：
问题: v15在bookUrl中用java.ajax()搜索，Legado显示发现列表时对每本书
      都执行ajax(1.5s/本)，80本书=120秒
修复: bookUrl只编码中文参数(瞬时)，不做ajax搜索
      改用ruleBookInfo.tocUrl在用户点击后才搜索提取详情页链接

流程对比:
  v15: 发现页→80本书各ajax搜索(120s)→显示列表
  v16: 发现页→编码URL(瞬时)→显示列表→点击→访问搜索页→提取详情页→目录
  v16.1:搜索增加cookie.removeCookie

v14修复（已保留）：
- content: @js:遍历选择器(#txt→#htmlContent→#content→#booktxt→.show-content)
- chapterUrl: 纯URL逻辑(不依赖#content_url)
- chapterList: CSS逗号兼容6种源站结构
全程零WebView

bookSourceComment:
幻影小说网 huiysj.com
v5: 修复正文重复问题
- 不存在的分页_N.html会被301重定向到首页
- java.ajax()跟随重定向导致首页内容被重复追加
- 修复:检查页码(第N页)是否匹配期望值,不匹配则停止
- 目录:自动翻页+跳过重复章节
- 正文:Base64解密+多页合并
本书源难点：详情页显示目录前100章链接href，目录页101开始且链接需要自己拼接。正文加密

bookSourceComment:
更新日志请点击登录，更新书源中查看

基础使用教程：
1、搜索：
    1)基础搜索：在发现页长按该书源，点击搜索，直接搜，搜索范围(全部来源小说)
    2)进阶搜索：在登陆-书源设置中选择指定模式/来源，可搜索指定模式/来源内容
    3)快捷搜索：使用特殊关键词(x,t,m,d,@)搜索
         x:书名@来源  如(x:十日终焉@番茄)
         t:书名@来源  如(t:十日终焉@番茄)
         m:书名@来源  如(m:十日终焉@番茄)
         d:书名@来源  如(d:十日终焉@番茄)
         其中：x表示小说(可省略)，t表示听书，m表示漫画，d表示短剧
         冒号支持中文英文
         
2、发现页：
    在书源设置中选择指定模式或者单个来源，然后刷新发现页即可
    
3、更多使用方式长按发现页书源选择登录一目了然
4、用户后台有视频教程
exploreUrl:
<js>
var open_argument = source.getVariable();
if (!open_argument || open_argument == '') {
    var initData = {
        tab: "小说",
        tone_id: "默认音色",
        server: host[0],
        sources: "番茄",
        source_type: "男频",
        find_source: "番茄",
        find_tab: "小说",
        fqpara: "on"
    };
    source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(initData));
    open_argument = source.getVariable();
}
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || host[0];
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_tab') || getArguments(open_argument, 'tab') || '小说';
var sources =  getArguments(open_argument, 'sources') || '番茄';
var fxyjr = getArguments(open_argument, 'fxyjr');


function checkEnv() {
    let isModified = false;
    try {
        new Packages.io.legato.kazusa.utils.TimeoutCancellationException('');
        isModified = true;
    } catch (e) {
        isModified = typeof source.loginUi == 'function' ? false : true;
    }

    return isModified;
}

var islyc = checkEnv();
let device_type = '安卓';
try {
	  try {
	  java.qread();
	  device_type ="轻阅读";
	  } catch {
	  	java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
	  	}
    
} catch (e) {
    try {
        java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (((islyc&&device_type!='苹果') || device_type=='轻阅读') && fxyjr != "on"){
	sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_source') || sources;
	setArguments('find_source', sources);
	}
var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [ ];
if (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部') {
infoData = [{
        "title": "登录番茄",
        "url": '{\{java.startBrowser("https://fanqienovel.com/","番茄登录");}}',
        "style": {
            "layout_flexGrow": 1,
            "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
        }
    }];
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架" + fqssionid);
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
//let qtcookie = ""
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};



qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url + '/get_book_shelf,' + qtop;

let qtsj = [];

if (((islyc&&device_type!='苹果') || device_type=='轻阅读') && fxyjr !="on") {
    try {
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "线路",
            host,
            base_url,
            "server",
            1
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "模式",
            ["小说", "听书", "短剧", "漫画"],
            tab,
            "find_tab",
            0.33
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "频道",
            ["男频", "女频"],
            source_type,
            "source_type",
            0.33
        ));
        let source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '书旗', '塔读', '江湖', '小米', '米读', 'QQ阅读', '酷我小说','幻梦轻小说', '西瓜小说', '69书吧', '顶点', '爱下电子书', '伪69', '超会专属小说', '3A小说', '阅友小说', '笔趣阁22', '追更人', '久久小说', '52书库', '腐小说', '完本小说', '盐选文库', '有度中文', '三零读书', '鹿鹿', '星空小说', '365小说', '冷冷文学', '万相书城', '独步小说', '福书网', '速读谷', '全本同人'];
        if (tab == '听书') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '喜马拉雅', '酷我'];
        }
        if (tab == '漫画') {
            source_list = ['全免漫画', '番茄', '包子漫画', '漫画屋', '漫画网', '漫客栈', '漫画屋'];
        }
        if (tab == '短剧') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '河马短剧', '旺旺短剧', '极速影视'];
        }
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "平台",
            source_list,
            sources,
            "find_source",
            1
        ));
       const excludeTitles = ['点击登录可切换来源', '切换后长按刷新即可'];
       style_list = style_list.filter(item => !excludeTitles.includes(item.title));
    } catch {}
} else {
	if (device_type == '安卓'){
	qtsj.push({
        "title": "下载阅读Sigma最新测试版",
        "url": '{\{java.longToast("本书源推荐使用最新版洛娅橙改版阅读Σ\\n请安装后重新导入书源");java.startBrowser("https://legado.langge.cf","下载阅读Sigma最新测试版");}}',
        "style": {
            "layout_flexGrow": 1,
            "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1
        }
    })}
	}

if (qtcookie) {
qtsj.push({
    title: "大灰狼个人中心",
    url: qtsjurl,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
    }
})
} else {
qtsj.push({
    title: "登录大灰狼书源",
    url: `{\{java.startBrowser("${base_url}/login","登录书源");}}`,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
    }
})
}


var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

<js>
if (String(baseUrl).startsWith("data:")) {
    let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
    let book_id = res.book_id;
    let tab = res.tab;
    let sources = res.sources;
    let url = res.url;
    let html = "";
    let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
    if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
        if (sources == '69书吧') {
            let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
            let headers = {
        	 "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent":  java.getWebViewUA()
             };            
             let op = JSON.stringify({
                "headers": headers
            });
            html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);
        } else {
            html = java.ajax(url);
        }
        //java.log(html);
        if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
            cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
            java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
            html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

             java.log(html);
        }
    }
    let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
    let op = {
        method: "POST",
        body: {
            html: html
        }
    };
    op = JSON.stringify(op);
    let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (varia == 'null') {
        varia = '';
    }
    varia = JSON.stringify({
        'custom': varia
    });
    //varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
    java.log(`${base_url}/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
    try {
        result = java.ajax(`${base_url}/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
        JSON.parse(result);
    } catch(_err) {
        for (var _i = 0; _i < host.length; _i++) {
            if (host[_i] === base_url) continue;
            try {
                result = java.ajax(`${host[_i]}/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
                JSON.parse(result);
                setArguments("server", host[_i]);
                java.longToast("\n\n线路故障，已自动切换到：" + host[_i]);
                break;
            } catch(_e2) { continue; }
        }
    }
}

ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let key3 = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key3 = "";
}

if (key3 == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key3 = "";
        }
        if (key3) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            cookie.removeCookie(h);
            cookie.removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key3 + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    //let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (toneId == '') {
    	toneId= '4';
    	}
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "off") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}
</js>

});

);

    } catch (e) {

    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'sources') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources') || '0';
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'tab') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
function g(r) {
    try {
        return String(java.getString(r) || "").trim()
    } catch (e) {
        return ""
    }
}
var html = String(result);
var name = g("[property$=book_name]@content");
var author = g("[property$=author]@content");
var cat = g("[property$=category]@content");
var update = g("[property$=update_time]@content");
var last = g("[property$=latest_chapter_name]@content");
var words = g("class.booknav2@tag.p.2@text").replace(/\s*\|\s*/g, " · ");
var mt = html.match(/tags:\s*\x27([^\x27]*)\x27/);
var tags = mt ? mt[1].replace(/\|+/g, " · ").replace(/(^\s*·\s*|\s*·\s*$)/g, "").trim() : "";
var desc = g("class.navtxt@tag.p.0@textNodes").replace(/^[\s\u3000]+/, "").replace(/[\r\n]+/g, "\n").replace(/\n/g, "\n\u3000\u3000");
var L = [];

function add(icon, label, val) {
    if (val && String(val).trim()) L.push("\u3000\u3000" + icon + " " + label + "\uff1a" + val);
}
add("\ud83d\udcd5", "\u4e66\u540d", name);
add("\ud83d\udc64", "\u4f5c\u8005", author);
add("\ud83c\udff7\ufe0f", "\u5206\u7c7b", cat);
add("\ud83d\udcca", "\u5b57\u6570", words);
add("\ud83d\udd16", "\u6807\u7b7e", tags);
add("\ud83d\udd50", "\u66f4\u65b0", update);
add("\ud83d\udcd6", "\u6700\u65b0", last);
if (desc) {
    L.push("\u3000\u3000\u200b");
    L.push("\u3000\u3000\ud83d\udcdc \u7b80\u4ecb\uff1a");
    L.push("\u3000\u3000" + desc);
}
L.push("\u3000\u3000\u200b");
L.push("\u3000\u3000\ud83d\udccd \u4e66\u7c4d\u72b6\u6001\uff1a\u6b63\u5e38");
L.join("\n");
</js>

loginUrl:
<js>
function login(){
userInfo=source.getLoginInfoMap()
UNE=userInfo['手机号码/邮箱号']
PWD=userInfo['密码']
url="https://"+getUrl('爱发电')+"/api/passport/login,";

body={
  "account": String(UNE),
  "password": String(PWD),
  "mp_token": -1
}
option={
'method': 'POST',
'body': JSON.stringify(body)
}

url=url+JSON.stringify(option);
let ajaxData = java.ajax(url);
let jsonData = JSON.parse(ajaxData);

token=jsonData?.data?.auth_token;

let msg = jsonData.em;
if(token==undefined){
    throw new Error(msg);
}

Cookie={
	"Cookie":"auth_token="+token
	}
header = JSON.stringify(Cookie)
source.putLoginHeader(header)
}

function select(i){
	try{
	putUrl(i);
	let s = source.getVariable();
	let urlData = JSON.parse(s);
	let data = urlData.data;
	urlData.index = i;
	let t = data[i].t;
	java.toast("当前源站切换为：\n"+t);
	source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(urlData));
	}catch(e){java.log(e)}
	}
</js>

【网站】黑白中文 (hbtpdq.com) 【技术实现】 搜索：HTML 搜索（GET /so.html?keyWord=关键词） 发现：HTML 发现（GET /fenlei/{分类}/{{page}}.html） 详情：Default 规则（class.top@tag.h1 精确定位书名） 目录：Default 规则（第二个 section-box） 正文：HTML 提取 + JS 清理 【局限性】 - 网站有 Cloudflare 保护，首次访问可能需要验证 - 正文有分页，已配置 nextContentUrl 自动翻页 - 搜索结果无封面图 【v2 修复记录】 - 搜索/发现列表：改用 Default 格式（tag.a.0@text）替代 CSS 格式，解决字段提取失败问题 - 搜索表头行：tag.a.0 对表头行返回空值，自动过滤 - 详情页书名：改用 class.top@tag.h1 精确定位，避免匹配到 logo 的 h1 【v3 修复记录】 - 正文分页标题：用全局正则删除所有 章节名(第X/Y页)

标记，避免多页拼接后残留

try{ const bbb = book.getVariable("custom"); const sss = source.getVariable(); if (/jjwxc|vipContent/.test(baseUrl)) { function decode(){ baseUrl = `https://app.jjwxc.org/androidapi/chapterContent?versionCode=381&${bDe(baseUrl)}`; //let date = "Mobile " + Date.now(); let response = java.get(baseUrl, {}); let content = String(response.body()); isPay = !/"content"/.test(content)&&!/"data":{}/.test(content); if(isPay){ let accesskey = String(response.header("accesskey")); let keyString = String(response.header("keystring")); let accesskeyLen = accesskey.length; let v6 = accesskey.charCodeAt(accesskeyLen - 1); let v9 = 0; for (var i = 0; i < accesskey.length; i++) { v9 += accesskey.charCodeAt(i); } let v15 = v9 % keyString.length; let v17 = Math.floor(v9 / 65); let v18 = keyString.length; let v43 = keyString.substring(v15, v17 + v15 > v18 ? v18 : v17 + v15);; let v32 = content.length; let [v38, dest] = (v6 & 1) !== 0 ? [content.slice(-12), content.slice(0, -12)] : [content.slice(0, 12), content.slice(12)]; let key = java.md5Encode(v43 + v38).slice(0, 8); let iv = java.md5Encode(v38).slice(0, 8); content = java.createSymmetricCrypto("DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding", key, iv).decryptStr(dest); } return content } let intro = String(java.get("intro1")).replace(/\s/g, ''); const hasContent = /"content"/.test(result); java.setContent(hasContent ? result : decode()); intro = intro ? `◎${intro}◎
` : ''; let content = String(java.getString("$..content")); let saybody = String((/关闭作话/.test(bbb) || /关闭作话/.test(sss))?"":java.getString("$..sayBody")); saybody = saybody.replace(/(?:.*(?:蟹蟹|扔了|感谢|投出|灌溉营养液|送的|谢谢).*?(?:手榴|月票|霸王票|小天使|火箭炮|深水鱼雷|浅水炸弹|地雷|营养液)([xX]\d+)*.*|非常感谢大家对我的支持，我会继续努力的！|.*?瓶[；~]|“.*?”(?:营养液|手榴弹|月票|霸王票|小天使|火箭炮|深水鱼雷|浅水炸弹|地雷)x\d+|读者.*?(月石|营养液).*|地雷感谢：[\s\S]+)/g,''); let say = /[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/.test(saybody) ? `\n【📢作者有话说】\n${saybody}` : ''; if (/token|vipContent/.test(baseUrl)) { const vipc = content.length > 30 ? java.createSymmetricCrypto("DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding", "KW8Dvm2N", "1ae2c94b").decryptStr(content) : `${/23110/.test(String(java.getString("$..message")))?"请使用安卓端的token":java.getString("$..message")}\n❗️登录后请先更新目录，再刷新正文`; result = intro + vipc + say; } else { result = intro + content + say; } } result; }catch(e){ java.log(e) } ##为营造更好的评论环境，近期网站要求发评须进行实名认证，未实名用户评论暂时仅在对应作者后台及发评用户后台可见.*|获取正文失败[\s\S]+|◎\s+?◎|◎undefined◎

function removeDuplicatedParagraphs(text, chapterTitle) {
    var paragraphs = text.split('\n');
    var firstParagraph = paragraphs[0].trim();
    var containsSpecialChar = firstParagraph.includes('◎');
    var targetIndex = containsSpecialChar ? 1 : 0;
    var targetParagraph = paragraphs[targetIndex].trim();
    var lastChar = targetParagraph.charAt(targetParagraph.length - 1);
    var isPunctuation = /[——◎。！？，；：\?!,;:》 】）”’…~"'\)]/.test(lastChar);
    
    if (!isPunctuation) {
        for (var i = 0; i < chapterTitle.length - 1; i++) {
            var twoChars = chapterTitle.substring(i, i + 2);
            if (twoChars === '  ' || twoChars.includes('☪')) continue;
            
            if (targetParagraph.includes(twoChars)) {
                java.log("删除当前段落：" + targetParagraph);
                java.log("当前章节名：" + chapterTitle);
                java.log("相同连续文字：" + twoChars);
                paragraphs.splice(targetIndex, 1);
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    return paragraphs.join('\n');
}


let bbb = String(book.getVariable("custom"));
let sss = String(source.getVariable());
if(/净化/.test(sss)||/净化/.test(bbb))result = removeDuplicatedParagraphs(result, title);
result = result.replace(/<br\/>/g,'\n');

result
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
if(/incrementFavorite/.test(baseUrl)){
let order = Number(java.get("order"));
function sortBooks(data, order) {
  let sortedData = JSON.parse(data).addData;
  if (java.get("classid") == "0") {
    sortedData = sortedData.filter(book => book.classId === "0");
  }
  switch(order) {
    case 1: 
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {   	
        return Date.parse(b.chapterdateNewest.replace(/ /,'T')) - Date.parse(a.chapterdateNewest.replace(/ /,'T'));
      });
      break;   
    case 2:
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {
        return Number(b.favoriteDate) - Number(a.favoriteDate);
      });
      break;    
    case 3:
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {
        return Number(b.novelbefavoritedcount) - Number(a.novelbefavoritedcount);
      });
      break;    
    case 4:   
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {
        return Number(b.original_novelsize) - Number(a.original_novelsize);
      });
      break;    
    default:
      break;
  }
  return sortedData;
}
result = JSON.stringify(sortBooks(src,order))
	}
	
function transformNovelList(jsonData) {
    const data = typeof jsonData === 'string' ? JSON.parse(jsonData) : jsonData;
    Object.keys(data.novellist).forEach(categoryName => {
        data.novellist[categoryName].forEach(novel => {
            novel.cname = categoryName;
        });
    });
    
    return JSON.stringify(data)
}
if(/authorid=/.test(baseUrl))result=transformNovelList(result);

if(baseUrl.includes("favObservationByDate")){
	let nb = String(Map("nb")||"1,2,3,4,8,9");
	nb = nb.split(",");
	let list= JSON.parse(result).data.list;
	let l = [];
	list.forEach((x,i)=>{
		x.p = "第"+(i+1)+"名";
		let fz = x.fit_fenzhan;
		let r = fz.filter(v=>nb.includes(v));
		  if(r.length==2)l.push(x);
		});
		result = JSON.stringify(l);
	}
result
</js>

variableComment:
源变量

填写【移出/加入/移入书架数据】 —— 这是用来操作晋江app的收藏的，如
移出尚未分类::0 会把当前书籍移出晋江的收藏
加入尚未分类::0,1,1 会加入收藏至晋江的尚未分类书架
移入尚未分类::0,0,2 会把已加入晋江收藏的书籍移入晋江的尚未分类书架。
书架数据：在登录页的【📚获取书架】获取，获取后将显示在源变量设置
刷新详情页生效之后会删除【移出/加入/移入书架数据】字样。
填写【批量移出/加入/移入书架数据】则不会自动删除这些字样，在阅读的书架刷新会批量操作，需要手动删除，避免重复请求。

其他源变量操作请在登录里查看【使用说明】

bookSourceComment:
26.07.08@小说迷 修复cf验证 搜索列表 【网站】领域书库 (lysxh.com) 【技术实现】 搜索：HTML 搜索（GET /search.html?keyWord=关键词） 发现：HTML 发现（GET /fenlei/{分类全拼}/{{page}}/） 详情：Default 规则（class.top@tag.h1 精确定位书名） 目录：Default 规则（第二个 section-box） 正文：HTML 提取 + JS 清理 【局限性】 - 网站有 Cloudflare Turnstile 保护，首次访问可能需要验证 - 正文有分页，已配置 nextContentUrl 自动翻页 - 仅支持 HTTP（HTTPS 证书不兼容） 【规则说明】 - 搜索/发现列表：Default 格式（tag.a.0@text），表头行自动过滤 - 详情页书名：class.top@tag.h1 精确定位，避免匹配到 logo 的 h1 - 正文分页标题：全局正则删除所有 章节名(第X/Y页)

标记 - 分类 URL 使用全拼：xuanhuan/wuxia/dushi/lishi/wangyou/kehuan/nvsheng - 分页格式：/fenlei/分类/{{page}}/（目录式，非 .html 式）

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var html = String(result);
var doc = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(html);
var nr = doc.selectFirst('article#nr');
var lines = [];
if (nr) {
    var rawHtml = String(nr.html());
    rawHtml = rawHtml.replace(/<br\s*\/?>/gi, '\n');
    var parts = rawHtml.split('\n');
    for (var i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) {
        var line = parts[i].replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '').replace(/ /g, ' ').replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').trim();
        if (line) {
            if (/最新网址|m\.biqukun|本章未完.*继续阅读/.test(line)) continue;
            lines.push(line);
        }
    }
    if (lines.length > 0 && /^第\d+章/.test(lines[0])) {
        lines.shift();
    }
}
lines.join('\n');
</js>

<js>
var html = String(result);
var doc = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(html);
var content = doc.selectFirst('div.TxtContent');
var lines = [];
if (content) {
    var ps = content.select('p');
    for (var i = 0; i < ps.size(); i++) {
        var t = String(ps.get(i).text()).replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').trim();
        if (t && !/温馨提示|本章.*完.*继续阅读|wjzxchina/.test(t)) {
            lines.push(t);
        }
    }
    if (lines.length === 0) {
        var text = String(content.text()).replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').trim();
        if (text) lines.push(text);
    }
}
lines.join('\n');
</js>

bookSourceComment:
by狼崽儿 //2026.6.30
❗️❗️❗️书源设置→登录，不用登录账号，随便点击一本漫画，一直到正文页通过拦截测试再重新搜索❗️❗️❗️
因为我尝试了很久，都解决不了详情页和正文页弹出验证的问题。但是偶然间发现，只要在登录页里进入网站，随便点开一本漫画观看，人工手动验证以后这个cookie会管用一段时间，这个时候再搜索和浏览详情页就有效了。就算没弹出人机验证也没关系，完成以上步骤就能正常用了。
巴卡漫画发布页：https://bakamh.app/

bookSourceComment:
//2026.6.20
用了夜泽川的猕猴桃漫画的代码做了发布页和翻页规则，在此郑重感谢。
！！！大家一定要擦亮眼睛，不要给这个网站买会员啊！直接在Legado阅读里阅读或者去正版漫蛙网站里看。正版漫蛙是htpps://www.mw777.me。这个源爬的网站胜在国内连接稳定，更换了域名也容易改，网速差可以考虑挂梯或换域名。
用户ljy911028发的是正版漫蛙的源，大家可以也去那里看看。
我也是在昨天才发现这个网站是需要开会员看部分漫画的，之前一直都是直接抓取api阅读，所以不要在这个网站充钱，真正的漫蛙是完全免费的。

bookSourceComment:
❗️特别标注：本源只支持洛雅橙改版阅读Σ最新测试版https://github.com/Luoyacheng/legado

搜索分类
@用户
%视频
#专栏
&直播
*番剧
？影视

API来源
https://github.com/SocialSisterYi/bilibili-API-collect

url scheme链接来源
AI和网页

⚙️部分功能说明【自己随便点点点看看吧】
登录使用效果更佳

1、详情页界面 
点击书名显示【最新评论】
长按书名显示【热门评论】

点击UP主名字显示 【视频列表/专栏文集】【根据登录页设置来】
长按UP主名字显示 【视频合集/专栏动态】【根据登录页设置来】

点击 查看全部动态【查看动态】
长按 查看全部动态【搜索该up主动态】

点击右上角◎ 打开哔哩哔哩客户端
点击分享按钮，复制分享详情
点击拷贝书籍详情URL  复制网页链接
点击登录 可选择【关注up到b站 [需登录账号]】

2、视频页
点击右上角◎ 打开推荐视频 【影视无效，直播无效】
点击登录 可点赞投币收藏

3、发现页
长按书源选项后打开登录页面，可筛选分类

4、正文页
视频/文章图可点击跳转
🔗📖🎥👤图标可点击跳转
exploreUrl:
<js>
try{
let all = [];
let 展开符 = "↓ ";
let 收起符 = "↑ ";
let 占位符 = "※"
let 启用占位 = true   //是：true,否：false
//一行个数
let numy = 3;

let d = {
    1: 1,
    2: 0.4,
    3: 0.25,
    4: 0.2,
    5: 0.15,
    7: 0.1,
    10: 0.05
};

let num = d[numy];
let push = (title, url, num, g,action) =>{
	let j = {
    title: title,
    url: url,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: g == 0 ? g : 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: num
    }
  }
     if(action){
         j.action = action.action;
         j.name = action.name;
         j.type = action.type;
         j.chars = action.chars;
         j.viewName = action.viewName;
         j.default = action.default;      
     }     
     all.push(j)	
} 

function zwf(len,numy,num){
	if(len%numy!==0){
        let n = len % numy;
        let p = numy-n;
      
        for(let i=0;i<p;i++){
            push(占位符, ``, num, 1,{"type":"button","action":"java.toast('这是占位符')"});
        }
    }
}
let navdata = java.ajax("https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/nav")
let mid = JSON.parse(navdata)?.data?.mid || "";
let searchOrder = changeSearch();

push("搜索类型", "", searchOrder.length?0.4:1,1,{
        "type": "select",
        "action":"show(infoMap['搜索类型'],'searchselect');changeSearch()",
        "chars":["🏷综合","👤用户","🎥视频","📖专栏","🎞影视","📽番剧","📺直播"],
        "default": Map("searchselect")||"综合"
    });
    
    
    if(searchOrder.length){
    push("搜索排序", "", 0.4,1,{
        "type": "select",
        "action":"show(infoMap['搜索排序'],'searchorder')",
        "chars":searchOrder,
        "default": Map("searchorder")||"综合排序"
    });
    }
    push("搜索关键词", "",d["2"],1,{
        "type": "text",
        "viewName":"'搜索关键词： '+Map('searchk')",
        "action":"show(infoMap['搜索关键词'],'searchk',1)",
        "default":Map("searchk")
    });
    push("🔍搜索", "", d["5"],1,{
    	    "action":"toSearch()",   
        "type": "button"       
    });
push("👤我的", "", 1);
push("推送视频", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/index/top/feed/rcmd", num);
push("热门视频", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/popular?pn={\{page}}", num);
push("入站必刷", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/popular/precious", num);

if (mid) {
    push("正在直播", "https://api.live.bilibili.com/xlive/web-ucenter/v1/xfetter/GetWebList?hit_ab=true", num);

    push("专栏动态", `https://api.bilibili.com/x/polymer/web-dynamic/v1/feed/all?timezone_offset=-480&type=article&platform=web&offset={\{if(page==1){source.put("nextoffset","")};source.get("nextoffset")}}&page={\{page}}`, num);
    push("视频动态", `https://api.bilibili.com/x/polymer/web-dynamic/v1/feed/all?timezone_offset=-480&type=video&platform=web&offset={\{if(page==1){source.put("dnextoffset","")};source.get("dnextoffset")}}&page={\{page}}`, num);
    push("历史记录", `https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/history/cursor?max={\{if(page==1){source.put("nextoffset","")};source.get("nextoffset")}}`, num);
    if(启用占位){
    push(占位符, ``, num, 1,{"type":"button","action":"java.toast('这是占位符')"});
    push(占位符, ``, num, 1,{"type":"button","action":"java.toast('这是占位符')"});
    }
push("⚙️关注分组", "", 1,1,{
        "action":"show(infoMap['⚙️关注分组'],'follows')",        
        "type": "toggle",
        "chars": [展开符, 收起符],
        "default": Map("follows")||展开符
});

if(isShow('follows',展开符)){
        push("全部", "https://api.bilibili.com/x/relation/followings?vmid="+mid+"&pn={\{page}}",num);
        关注分组url = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/relation/tags";
        关注分组data = JSON.parse(java.ajax(关注分组url));
        (关注分组data?.data ?? []).forEach(x => {
            push(x.name, `https://api.bilibili.com/x/relation/tag?pn={{page}\}&tagid=${x.tagid}`, num)
        })
        
        启用占位?zwf((关注分组data?.data ?? []).length+1,numy,num):null
    }

push("🗂收藏夹", "", 1,1,{
        "action":"show(infoMap['🗂收藏夹'],'favse')",        
        "type": "toggle",
        "chars": [展开符, 收起符],
        "default": Map("favse")||展开符
});
if(isShow('favse',展开符)){
        收藏夹url = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/v3/fav/folder/created/list-all?up_mid=" + mid;
        收藏夹data = JSON.parse(java.ajax(收藏夹url));
        (收藏夹data?.data?.list ?? []).forEach(x => {
            push(x.title, `https://api.bilibili.com/x/v3/fav/resource/list?media_id=${x.id}&ps=20&pn={\{page}}`, num)
        })
        
        启用占位?zwf((收藏夹data?.data?.list ?? []).length,numy,num):null
    }
}
let 分区 = ["动画::1005", "游戏::1008", "鬼畜::1007", "音乐::1003", "舞蹈::1004", "影视::1001", "娱乐::1002", "知识::1010", "科技数码::1012", "资讯::1009", "美食::1020", "小剧场::1021", "汽车::1013", "时尚美妆::1014", "体育运动::1018", "动物::1024", "vlog::1029", "绘画::1006", "人工智能::1011", "家装房产::1015", "户外潮流::1016", "健身::1017", "手工::1019", "旅游出行::1022", "三农::1023", "亲子::1025", "健康::1026", "情感::1027", "生活兴趣::1030", "生活经验::1031", "神秘学::1028"];

push("📽视频分区", "", 1,1,{
        "action":"show(infoMap['📽视频分区'],'videofq')",        
        "type": "toggle",
        "chars": [展开符, 收起符],
        "default": Map("videofq")||展开符
});

if(isShow('videofq',展开符)){
分区.forEach(x => {
    let a = x.split("::");
    let json = `{display_id:page,request_cnt:20,from_region:${a[1]},device:"web",web_location:333.40138}`
    push(a[0], `https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/region/feed/rcmd?{\{getWbiEnc(${json})}}`, num)
});
启用占位?zwf(分区.length,numy,num):null
}

function getUrl(st = -1, sv = -1, area = -1, is_finish = -1, cr = -1, ss = -1, year = -1, rd = -1, sid = -1, pid = -1, order = -1) {
    return `https://api.bilibili.com/pgc/season/index/result?season_type=${st}&type=1&page={\{page}}&pagesize=50&season_version=${sv}&area=${area}&is_finish=${is_finish}&copyright=${cr}&season_status=${ss}&year=${java.encodeURI(year)}&release_date=${java.encodeURI(rd)}&style_id=${sid}&producer_id=${pid}&order=${order}`
}

push("视频类型","","1",1,{      
        "type": "select",
        "chars": [ "🎬番剧","🎥电影","🎞纪录片","🇨🇳国创","📺电视剧","🍿综艺"],
        "default": Map("videolx")||"🎬番剧",
        "action":"show(infoMap['视频类型'],'videolx')"
 });
 
 push("🔁排序","",d["2"],1,{
            "type": "select",        
            "chars": ["更新时间", "弹幕数量", "播放数量","追剧人数","最高评分","开播时间","上映时间"],
            "default": Map("order")||"追剧人数",
            "action":"show(infoMap['🔁排序'],'order')",
});
push("💰付费","",d["2"],1,{        	   
            "type": "select",       
            "chars": ["全部", "免费","付费", "大会员"],
            "default": Map("pay")||"全部",
            "action":"show(infoMap['💰付费'],'pay')"
})
        
function createFilterFromData(typeKey, namePrefix, fenleiData, f, icon) {
    const dataArray = [];
    (fenleiData[f] ?? []).forEach(x => {
        dataArray.push(x.n);
    });
    if (dataArray.length) {
        push(icon + namePrefix,"",d["2"],1,{
            "type": "select",
            "chars": dataArray,
            "default": Map(icon + namePrefix) || "全部",
            "action":`show(infoMap['${icon + namePrefix}'],'${icon + namePrefix}')`
        });
    }
}

    let videolx = String(Map("videolx"))?String(Map("videolx")):"🎬番剧";
    let icon = videolx.match(/^([^\u4e00-\u9fa5]+)/)[1];
    let f = videolx.match(/([\u4e00-\u9fa5]+)$/)[1];
    
    createFilterFromData("出品", "出品", fenlei["出品"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("状态", "状态", fenlei["状态"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("版权", "版权", fenlei["版权"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("类别", "类别", fenlei["类别"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("地区", "地区", fenlei["地区"], f, icon);
    createFilterFromData("年份", "年份", fenlei["年份"], f, icon);
    
    let ss = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "付费", String(Map('pay')));
    let order = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "排序", String(Map('order')), null);
    let area = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "地区", String(Map(icon + "地区")));
    let sv = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "类别", String(Map(icon + "类别")));
    let is_finish = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "状态", String(Map(icon + "状态")));
    let cr = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "版权", String(Map(icon + "版权")));
    let year = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "年份", String(Map(icon + "年份")));
    let pid = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "出品", String(Map(icon + "出品")));
    let rd = getValueByIconAndName(icon, "年份", String(Map(icon + "年份")));
    
    let st = fenlei["类型v"][fenlei["类型"].indexOf(f)];
    fenlei["风格"][f].forEach(y => {
        let url = getUrl(st, sv, area, is_finish, cr, ss, year, rd, y.v, pid, order);
        push(y.n, url, num)
    });
    启用占位?zwf(fenlei["风格"][f].length,numy,num):null
    
    result = JSON.stringify(all)
    
}catch(e){
	java.log(e)
	java.longToast("本书源只支持最新版洛雅橙改版阅读Σ\n请安装后重新导入书源");	java.startBrowser("https://loyc.xyz/c/legado.html#download", "下载阅读Σ最新测试版");
	
	result = `下载阅读Σ::{\{java.longToast("本书源只支持最新版洛雅橙改版阅读Σ\\n请安装后重新导入书源");java.startBrowser("https://loyc.xyz/c/legado.html#download","下载阅读Σ最新测试版");}}`;
	}

<js>

let b = String(book.bookUrl);
let bmid = S("$.data.mid||$.data.list.mid||$.data.item.basic.uid||$.data.item.modules.module_author.mid||$.data.owner.mid||$.data.root.mid");
let bookintro = String(book.intro);
book.putVariable("mid", bmid);
cache.put("mid",bmid);

caid = String(cache.get("aid"));	cache.put("aid",S("$.result.main_section.episodes[0].aid"));

book.putVariable("id",S("$.data.item.basic.comment_id_str"));
getMode();

if (/web-interface\/view|series|season_id=|acc\/info/.test(b)) {
    if (/音频模式/.test(bookintro)) {
        book.type = 32;
    } else if (/视频模式/.test(bookintro)) {
        book.type = 4;
    }
} else if (/article/.test(b)) {
    book.type = 8;
}

if (/web-interface\/view/.test(baseUrl)) {
    var p = JSON.parse(result).data;
    book.putVariable("mid", p.owner.mid);
    var d = [];
    var aid = p.aid;
    
    if (p.pages.length == 1) {
        cid = p.pages[0].cid;
        d.push({
            title: p.title,
            url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(aid+"&"+p.cid)},{"type":"c"}`,
            pubdate: p.pubdate,
            desc: formatTimeDynamic(p.duration)
        });
    } else if (p.pages.length > 1) {
        p.pages.forEach(item => {
            cid = item.cid;
            d.push({
                title: item.part===""?"无名":item.part,
                desc: formatTimeDynamic(item.duration),
                url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(aid+"&"+item.cid)},{"type":"c"}`,
                pubdate: item.pubdate,

            })
        })
    }
    if (p.ugc_season) {
        d.unshift({
            title: "当前视频",
            vol: 1
        });

        let s = p.ugc_season.sections;
                    if(/倒序/.test(M("合集"))){
                          s= s.reverse();
                    }
                    d.push({
                        title:"视频合集",
                        vol:1
                    });
                      
                    
        s.forEach(el=> {
            if(s.length>1){
            d.push({
                        title: "🎥 "+ el.title+"【"+el.episodes.length+"个视频】",
                        url:`data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode("🎥"+el.title)},{"type":"el"}`
                    });
               }
                    ep = el.episodes;
                    if(/倒序/.test(M("合集"))){
                          ep = ep.reverse();
                    }
               ep.forEach((x,i) => {
                     if(x.bvid === p.bvid){
                        d[0].title = d[0].title+ "  "+(i+1)+"/" +el.episodes.length+"【"+el.title+"】"+x.title
                    }
                if (x.pages.length == 1) {
                    d.push({
                        title:(i+1)+"🏷 "+ x.title+" ",
                        url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(x.aid + "&" + (x.pages[0] ? x.pages[0].cid : x.cid))},{"type":""}`,
                        pubdate: x.arc.pubdate,
                        desc: formatTimeDynamic(x.arc.duration)
                    });
                }

                if (x.pages.length > 1) {
                     d.push({
                        title: (i+1)+" 📖 "+ x.title+"【"+x.pages.length+"P】",
                        url:`data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode("🎥"+x.title)},{"type":"el"}`
                    });
                    x.pages.forEach((y,j)=> {
                        d.push({
                            title: (i+1)+"-" +(j+1)+"🏷 "+y.part,
                            url: `data:bilibili;base64,${java.base64Encode(x.aid + "&" + y.cid)},{"type":""}`,
                            pubdate: y?.arc?.pubdate ?? x?.arc?.pubdate ??"",
                            desc: formatTimeDynamic(y?.arc.duration ?? y.duration) + " "+x.title
                        });
                    });
                }
            });
        });
    }
    result = JSON.stringify(d)
} else if (/reply\/reply/.test(baseUrl)) {
    if(JSON.parse(src)?.data?.root?.mid){
        book.putVariable("mid", JSON.parse(src)?.data?.root?.mid);
    }
} else if (/x\/article\/view/.test(baseUrl)) {
    book.putVariable("mid", S("$.data.author.mid"));
    result = JSON.stringify([{
        "title": S("$.data.title"),
        "url": getApi("article",S("$.data.id"),S("$.data.dyn_id_str"))
    }])
} else if (/acc\/info/.test(baseUrl)) {
    let name = S("$.data.name");
    let mid = S("$.data.mid");
    let d = [];
    let roomid = S("$.data.live_room.roomid");
    
    let liveStatus = S("$.data.live_room.liveStatus");
    if (liveStatus == "1") {
        liveStatus = "🔴";
        java.toast("【" + name + "】正在直播");
        java.log("【" + name + "】正在直播");
    } else if (liveStatus == "0") {
        liveStatus = "⚪️"
    }
    if (S("$.data.live_room.roundStatus") == "1") {
        liveStatus = "🟢"
    }
    let title = S("$.data.live_room.title");
    
    if (/🔴|🟢/.test(liveStatus)) {
        result = java.ajax("https://api.live.bilibili.com/xlive/web-room/v2/index/getRoomPlayInfo?room_id="+roomid+"&protocol=0,1&format=0,1,2&codec=0,1&qn=30000");
        let data = JSON.parse(result).data;
        let stream = data.playurl_info?.playurl?.stream;
        
        if(stream){
            let codec = stream[0].format[0].codec[0];
            let base_url = codec.base_url;
            let accept_qn = codec.accept_qn;
            accept_qn.forEach(code=>{
                d.push({
                    title:getVideoQuality(code),
                    vol:true
                });
               
                    codec.url_info.forEach((u,i)=>{
                         if(codec.current_qn==code){
                             let host = u.host;
                             let extra = u.extra;
                             d.push({
                                 title: (liveStatus+getVideoQuality(code)+(i+1) + "、【" + title + "】"  + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                                 url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(host+base_url+extra+"❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
                             })
                         }else{
                             d.push({
                                 title: (liveStatus+getVideoQuality(code)+(i+1) + "、【" + title + "】"  + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                                 url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(i+"&"+code+"❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
                             })
                         }
                  })
              })
             
          }else if(data.playurl_info == null){
              d.push({
                  title: (liveStatus+"直播已结束【" + title + "】"  + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                  url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode("❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
        })
          }
      }else {
        d.push({
            title: (liveStatus+"【" + title + "】" + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
            url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode("❌"+roomid)},{type:"live"}`
        })
    }
    
   
   /*
  //  直接获取视频流
    if (/中/.test(liveStatus)) {
        let liveApi = "https://api.live.bilibili.com/room/v1/Room/playUrl?qn=30000&cid=" + roomid;
        let data = java.ajax(liveApi);
        let durl = JSON.parse(data).data.durl;
        durl.forEach((x,i) => {
        	java.log(durl.length-1-i)
            d.push({
                title: "线路" + x.order,
                vol: true
            }, {
                title: (x.order + "、【" + title + "】" + liveStatus + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
                url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(durl[durl.length-1-i].url)},{type:"live"}`
            })
        })
    } else {
        d.push({
            title: ("【" + title + "】" + liveStatus + " " + name + "的直播间").replace(/【】/, ""),
            url: `data:liveurl;base64,${java.base64Encode(roomid+"&"+mid)},{type:"live"}`
        })
    }
    */
   
    result = JSON.stringify(d)
} else if (/data:dynamic_type|opus\/detail|v1\/detail/.test(baseUrl)) {
    
    result = JSON.stringify([{
        title:String(book.name),
        url:baseUrl
    }])
}
result

exploreUrl:
<js>
let config = (() => {
    try {
        let cfg = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())[0] || {};
        if (!cfg.host || !cfg.gender) {
            cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
            source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
            java.toast("配置初始化完成");
        }
        return cfg;
    } catch(e) {
        let cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
        source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
        return cfg;
    }
})();
    
let rawVariable = source.getVariable();
let 个人中心 = 1;
let obj = (title, url, type) => ({
  title: title,
  url: url,
  style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: type }
});

let sort = [];
let push = (title, url, type) => sort.push(obj(title, url, type));

let currentType = "";
let currentSource = "";
try {
  let vArray = JSON.parse(rawVariable);
  if (vArray.length > 0) {
    let v = vArray[0];
    currentType = v.gender || "";
    currentSource = v.source || "";
  }
} catch(e) {
  currentType = "";
  currentSource = "";
}

const getGenderDisplayName = (gender) => {
  if (gender == "boy") return "男频";
  if (gender == "girl") return "女频";
  return "";
};

const genderDisplay = getGenderDisplayName(currentType);

push(`当前为【${currentSource || "番茄小说"}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}`, "", 1);

if (currentSource == "晋江") {
	   sort.push({
        title: "📝点击签到",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jj_signin`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
    
    sort.push({
        title: "📂我的收藏",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jjbookshelf?token=`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
}

const excludedSources = ["小说", "听书", "漫画", "视频", "短剧", "音频","番茄小说"];

if (currentSource && !excludedSources.includes(currentSource)) {
  try {
    let apiUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}`;
    if (currentType) {
      apiUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
    }
    
    let response = JSON.parse(java.ajax(apiUrl));
    
    if (response.data && response.data.found) {
      response.data.found.forEach(item => {
        let finalUrl = "";
        if (item.url) {
          finalUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}&page={{page}}&url=${item.url}`;
          if (currentType) {
            finalUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
          }
        }
        sort.push({
          title: item.title,
          url: finalUrl,
          style: item.style || { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
        });
      });
    } else {
      push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
    }
  } catch(e) {
    push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
  }
  JSON.stringify(sort);
} else {
  let recommendUrl = getServerHost() + "/read_recommend?session=" + getSessionId();
    let guessUrl = getServerHost() + "/read_guess?session=" + getSessionId();
    push('个性推荐', recommendUrl, 0.45);
    push('猜你喜欢', 'https://fanqienovel.com/tab/cai', 0.45);
    push('巅峰榜单', 'https://fanqienovel.com/api/author/misc/top_book_list/v1/?limit=100&offset={{(page-1)*100}}', 0.29);
  push('出版榜单', 'https://fanqienovel.com/api/node/publication/list?page_index={{(page-1)*100}}&page_count=100', 0.29);
  push('爆更榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=15&type=1', 0.29);
  push('黑马榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=13&type=1', 0.29);
  push('热搜榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=12&type=1', 0.29);

  let showCategories = currentType == "girl" ? [0] : [1];
  
  showCategories.forEach(genderCode => {
    let isMale = genderCode == 1;
    let genderLabel = isMale ? "男频" : "女频";
    
    let categories = isMale ? [
      {id: 1141, name: "西方奇幻"},
      {id: 1140, name: "东方仙侠"},
      {id: 8, name: "科幻末世"},
      {id: 261, name: "都市日常"},
      {id: 124, name: "都市修真"},
